headline: ₹50.38-400 Cr at risk (direct penalty plus potential FII outflow) — ₹50.38 Cr GST demand creates direct P&L risk for ICICI Bank; tax transparency under scrutiny
what_matters: GST Act Section 73 demand; GRI:207-1, ESRS E1 triggers; risk of additional penalties if precedent set.
P/E compression risk of 0.5-1x if penalty upheld and disclosure gaps persist; margin erosion of 2-4 bps for FY26.
Potential 5-10 bps increase in cost of capital if ESG funds exit; risk of ₹200-400 Cr FII outflow if rating agencies downgrade.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹50.38-400 Cr at risk (direct penalty plus potential FII outflow)
Revenue at risk: ₹200-400 Cr (0.5-1% of FY25 revenue) via potential FII outflow and lost lending opportunities
